Precondition: Both end effectors empty; cup_1 and cup_2 accessible on top of box.
Postcondition: Right end effector grasping cup_2; left end effector grasping cup_1.

Precondition: Right end effector grasping cup_2; left end effector grasping cup_1; table accessible for placement.
Postcondition: cup_1 and cup_2 placed on table; both end effectors empty; box top unblocked.

Precondition: Both end effectors empty; box left and right sides accessible; box top unblocked.
Postcondition: Box grasped with both end effectors.
